items.title: Arrival of huge US thrift chain Savers unsettles Geelong op shops

children.content: Charity op shops in Geelong are feeling threatened by the arrival of US megastore Savers.

items.title: Police set to brief Donald locals about alleged child murder

children.content: Victoria Police will hold a public meeting in Donald on Monday to update locals on their investigation into the alleged murder of 13-year-old Layla Jeffery.

items.title: Travel alert level for Laos raised as distillery owner charged

children.content: Authorities say tourists should exercise a high degree of caution in the country due to the risk of methanol poisoning, which killed Australian women Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowles in 2024.

items.title: Rescue crews searching for canoeist, missing in Goulburn River

children.content: An SES spokesperson said the missing man is a "strong swimmer", but the current was "flowing quite rapidly".

items.title: Man charged over law firm fire and tobacco shooting in Melbourne's west

children.content: Police have made an arrest over an alleged arson in Spotswood and laid further charges over a shooting outside a tobacco store in Altona North.

image.altText: A building on fire.

items.title: 'I feel betrayed': Albert Park residents resist public housing relocation

children.content: An Albert Park tower block is shaping up as the next battleground for the Victorian government as part of its controversial rebuild of public housing towers, but many tenants are resisting attempts to move them out.

items.title: The Victorians watching coastal birds closely for looming H5N1 infection

children.content: Victorians are on high alert for the deadly H5N1 bird flu, as citizen scientists help to monitor infected birds.

items.title: Antisemitism inquiry turns uncomfortable lens on university protests

items.title: NSW woman arrested as part of Dezi Freeman investigation

children.content: A NSW woman was arrested in Bairnsdale today as part of Victoria Police's investigation into the movements of dead police killer Dezi Freeman.

items.title: Supreme Court battle over traditional owner consultation pauses flood works

children.content: The Victorian government and a regional water authority have admitted they did not property consult with traditional owners before approving a controversial flood plain restoration project.

items.title: Star Swan takes MOTY contender as Crows notch vital win

children.content: The Adelaide Crows beat the Swans in a thriller in the wet at the SCG to jump into the top four.

items.title: Melbourne, Sydney most expensive in world for beer and cigarettes, study finds

children.content: The Mapping the World's Prices report, published by Deutsche Bank, compares cost-of-living data in 69 cities across six continents.

items.title: Prescribed opioids led to addiction for woman battling endometriosis

items.title: How the Hawks are making their two-ruck strategy work

items.title: Victorian council 'disgusted' by mining company's attitude

children.content: A regional council has declined a mining company's invitation to join a community reference group and slammed the company for its attitude towards community concerns.

items.title: Whiskey, wine makers sound alarm for ancient trade of coopering

children.content: This ancient trade of coopering is fast evaporating as distillers look abroad to help keep their flavours top shelf.

items.title: Driver flips car during police chase through Melbourne suburbs

items.title: Victorian government tries to head off teacher strike with new pay offer

children.content: The government says its new offer amounts to a 28.3 per cent pay increase for teachers, principals and support staff over the next four years.

items.title: Father 'disgusted' over inadequacy of charges after Laos methanol poisoning

items.title: Drug traffickers jailed over failed plot to smuggle cocaine from PNG by plane

items.title: ANU head apologises for failing to protect Jewish staff, students

children.content: The interim vice-chancellor of the Australian National University has apologised for the institution's failure to protect the psychological safety of Jewish students and staff during pro-Palestinian encampments in 2024.

articles.title: Sydney uni chief regrets handling of pro-Palestinian encampments

items.title: Victoria's top cop helps arrest alleged armed offender in Melbourne CBD

items.title: Concerns over loophole allowing residents to shut down Victorian councils

children.content: Advocates say that unproven charges such as those against councillors at Hepburn Shire, triggering automatic stand-down laws, can bring any other council across the state to a shuddering halt.

items.title: Moira Deeming drops court bid against party after last-ditch plea to retain candidacy

children.content: Victorian MP Moira Deeming faces being disendorsed as a Liberal candidate for refusing to apologise to former party leader Matthew Guy, after accusing him of assaulting her at a community event in May.
